beats.en: Welcome! May I see your passport, please?
beats.zh: 歡迎!請給我看你的護照。

beats.en: What is the purpose of your visit?

opts.t: I'm here to watch the World Cup.

opts.s: 我是一顆足球。(文法對但語意錯)

beats.fbOk: Perfect answer! 目的講清楚,官員點頭放行。
beats.fbNo: 官員一臉困惑——purpose 問的是『目的』,要說你來做什麼。

beats.en: Enjoy your stay. Gate B is on your left.
beats.zh: 祝你玩得愉快。B 登機門在你左邊。

beats.intro: Read the airport board and fill the blanks.
beats.introZh: 讀機場看板,填入正確資訊。

blanks.q: The officer said Gate B. GATE = ?

beats.fb: 看板讀懂了!Arrived = 已抵達,Gate B。
